page_metadata.biotools__summary: Prediction server for animal mitochondrial genetic codes. It provides information about codon-usage, amino acid composition, GC content and a final genetic code prediction for a mitochondrial genome sequence.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Prediction server for animal mitochondrial genetic codes. It provides information about codon-usage, amino acid composition, GC content and a final genetic code prediction for a mitochondrial genome sequence.
